## Verification

- [ ] The final commit has no unintended generated or unrelated changes.
- [ ] `sh scripts/check.sh fast` passed on the final commit.
- [ ] `sh scripts/check.sh full` passed when this changes executable mathematics, generated records, claim status, or a completed building block.
- [ ] Imported results and primary citations were checked where relevant.
- [ ] Input encoding, runtime, state size, and finite-domain limits are stated where relevant.
